summary: Refresh monitoring assets and roll out Varnish observability updates

changes.description: Rebuild and redeploy the monitoring stack so the updated Filebeat and Metricbeat images go live, then re-bootstrap OpenSearch Dashboards so the corrected container CPU charts and new Varnish dashboard are available.
Rebuild shared cloud-swarm service images so the updated Varnish runtime image is published to the local registry before environment services are refreshed.
Force each environment's Varnish service to refresh against the rebuilt mz-varnish image so structured access logging is enabled without waiting for a normal deploy.
